Weapon

Plankton Siphon Gland

beam

Media

How To Read This Weapon

Damage typeCorrosive
Per hit12
Shot total12per hit x hit count
Approx. DPS133shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec178
Hits per shot1
TagsHealth leech, Shield leech, beam
  • Steals health from the target, (less effective vs shields).
  • Damage increases as it focuses on a target.

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase rate of fire by 20%. Increase health steal to 25% of damage done.n/aSteel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 12%. Increase range by 10%.n/aSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 16%. Increase the maximum focus bonus by 100%. Increase health steal to 40% of damage done. n/aSteel x1600Hydrogen Crystal x200
4Increase damage by 21%. Increase range by 10%.n/aSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x800
5Increase damage by 28%.n/aSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase rate of fire by 20%. Increase range by 20%. Reduce power consumption by 20%. Increase the maximum focus bonus by 100%. Increase health steal to 60% of damage done. n/aSteel x12800Iridium x800
